Meta.title: ADream — The operating system of innovation
Meta.description: Turn ideas into real projects. Innovation SaaS platform with workflows, AI, and facilitation. Free IFCA program available.

Hero.subtitle: Adream turns innovation into an executable, measurable, and collaborative system. Workflows + AI + facilitation, all in one platform.
Hero.microcopy: No credit card · 30-min demo · Onboarding included

Workflows.title: The operating system of innovation.
Workflows.subtitle: Four pre-built workflows so your team stops improvising and starts executing.

wf1.title: Startup Building
wf1.desc: The full path from first hunch to validated MVP. For founders who don't want to waste time.

wf2.title: Company Challenges
wf2.desc: Launch internal challenges, gather solutions, prioritize with your committee, and execute what matters.
bullets: Open or segmented call for ideas

wf3.title: Continuous Improvement
wf3.desc: For teams that already have product and want a real system to iterate without chaos.

wf4.title: More workflows on the way
wf4.desc: We're building templates for market research, digital transformation, and design sprints. Tell us which one you need first.

Features.title: Everything your team needs to execute.
Features.subtitle: Without switching between 7 tools. Without losing ideas in scattered docs.

f1.title: Built-in AI
f1.desc: AI that suggests, validates, and prioritizes ideas based on your industry.

f2.title: Pre-built workflows
f2.desc: Validated templates for the most common innovation processes.

f3.title: Team management
f3.desc: Assign roles, invite facilitators, track progress.

f4.title: Real-time metrics
f4.desc: Clear KPIs so you know what's executing — and what's not.

f5.title: Built-in collaboration
f5.desc: Comments, decisions, files. All in one place.

f6.title: Expert facilitation
f6.desc: Not just software — certified facilitators guide your process.
f6.speaker: Matías facilitating

IFCA.title: Become a certified innovation facilitator.
IFCA.subtitle: Learn to take teams from idea to execution, with proven methodology.
IFCA.enterprise: Enterprise team? We have corporate plans →

Testimonials.title: What our users say.
Testimonials.subtitle: Real teams, real projects, real execution.

items.quote: We went from PowerPoint ideas to 4 pilots running in the first quarter. Adream made innovation measurable.
items.name: María José Rivera

items.quote: IFCA gave me the language and frameworks. The product gave me the system. Now I facilitate challenges without chaos.
items.name: Carlos Mendoza

items.quote: The pre-built workflows saved us months. We launched our MVP in 6 weeks, not 6 months.
items.name: Andrea Soto

CTA.subtitle: Book 30 minutes. We'll show you how Adream fits your team, no commitment.

comingSoon.title: Live availability booking
comingSoon.subtitle: We're integrating real-time slot booking. For now, fill out the form and we'll reach out to coordinate.
comingSoon.responseBody: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you within 24 business hours to coordinate.

form.name: Full name
form.goal: What do you want to achieve? (optional)
form.source: How did you hear about us? (optional)
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong sending your message. Please try again in a moment.
form.errorRate: Too many requests. Please wait a minute and try again.

success.title: Message received!
success.subtitle: Your information is with our team.
success.etaSub: If you sent it outside business hours, it may be the next business day.
success.checkInbox: Check your inbox (and spam folder, just in case).

Manifesto.body: It's execution. Live MVPs. Teams that stopped improvising and started building. Adream exists so your next idea doesn't die in a PowerPoint.
